dream_text: I have an important meeting tomorrow. In the dream I was packing my bag for it and noticed my phone charger was dead. I kept trying different outlets, but nothing worked. I woke up still thinking about the meeting.

insight.notice: The dream stays close to tomorrow’s real meeting, so it may simply be carrying your preparation into sleep rather than pointing to a deeper meaning. The failed outlets add a sense of being unable to get one needed thing ready, and the meeting remained on your mind when you woke.
threads: The charger may matter less as an object than as something necessary that would not cooperate before an important event.
reflection_questions: Is there any practical part of the meeting preparation you still want to check?

pattern_candidates.label: Upcoming important meeting
pattern_candidates.evidence: The dreamer has an important meeting tomorrow and woke still thinking about it.

pattern_candidates.label: Repeated attempts to prepare
pattern_candidates.evidence: The dreamer packed a bag and tried several outlets to make the charger work.

pattern_candidates.label: Dead phone charger
pattern_candidates.evidence: The charger was dead and could not be restored through different outlets.
